## Cloud agent checklist
- [ ] Branch `feat/*` from `master` (not direct commits to `master`)
- [ ] No deploy, Firebase, prod smoke, or secrets
- [ ] No prod SHA or feature-flag changes unless explicitly assigned to coordinator
- [ ] PR only — **do not merge** (coordinator merges after review + CI)
